files.description: Generates Harisha-aware tooltips for automation buttons.
Monitors keyboard combos, refreshes tooltips, logs shortcut use with Harisha context.
Keeps the automation overlay badge updated and refreshes Harisha tooltips.
Surface panel showing Harisha score, zone state, and reflection summary.
Insight card showing weekly Super Ghost narrative, pattern summary, and export/run actions.
Chooses palette based on Harisha score + World Pulse mood.
Renders world pulse signals and Safe Pack + Harisha chips.
Executive summary for the living workspace stack.
